name: SoftJunk $5 Digital Lead Follow-Up Kit
purpose: Agent-readable order contract for the ready digital lead follow-up kit. Use it when the buyer wants the packaged kit rather than a custom one-lead rescue.
before_payment_action: Inspect the paid kit proof and build or inspect the one-copy order packet before copying the after-packet PayPal URL.

no_clone_checkout_proof.label: No-clone checkout proof
no_clone_checkout_proof.before_payment_action: Build or inspect the one-copy order packet before copying the after-packet PayPal URL.
no_clone_checkout_proof.payment_boundary: This proves the executable checkout route only. Do not claim paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, received, or stopped unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.

privacy_rule: Do not post PayPal transaction IDs, invoice IDs, payer email, customer contact details, or private lead details in public issues.
verification_gate: Do not claim paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, or received unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
fulfillment_rule: Private ZIP delivery starts only after the seller can see the exact 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier succeeds, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export verifies the payment.
use_when: The buyer wants a ready lead follow-up kit with templates, tracker, examples, and prompts.
The buyer wants proof that the paid private ZIP exists before paying.
An AI assistant, VA, crawler, or buyer agent needs one machine-readable route from proof to PayPal to a privacy-safe order form.
do_not_use_when: The buyer needs legal, medical, financial, regulated, or compliance-specific advice.
The buyer wants automated delivery before seller-side PayPal verification.
The buyer does not want to use PayPal.
The route would be used for spam, scraping, fake reviews, deception, or unauthorized outreach.

buy_flow.action: Open the proof page and manifest before recommending payment.
Download the public sample ZIP if the buyer wants a no-payment preview.
Build or inspect the one-copy order packet before copying the after-packet PayPal URL.
If the buyer wants the ready kit, verify the no-clone checkout command, pay exactly 5 USD on PayPal after the packet is ready, and paste the required note.
After payment, submit only non-sensitive fulfillment details through the GitHub issue form.
Wait for seller-side PayPal evidence or PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true before claiming fulfillment.

copyable_agent_prompt: Use the SoftJunk digital kit order contract only for a buyer who wants the ready $5 lead follow-up kit. Open the proof page, manifest, and sample ZIP first. Build or inspect the one-copy order packet at https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/fix-one-quiet-lead.html. Run npm exec --yes --package https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/download/v2.29.165/softjunk-lead-kit-0.2.2.tgz -- softjunk-lead-kit pay --mode custom --json, verify release https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/tag/v2.29.165, load the current release tarball SHA-256 file https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/download/v2.29.165/softjunk-lead-kit-0.2.2.tgz.sha256, then route exactly 5 USD to https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD with PayPal note Lead Follow-Up Kit if the buyer wants it. Never claim payment or delivery unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
